name: tiledbvcf
tagline: Reference guide for TileDB-VCF: installing, ingesting, querying, and exporting genomic variant data, plus an optional TileDB-Cloud scaling.
verdict: Concrete, well-declared install/ingest/query/export examples with upfront tooling requirements make this usable. Weaknesses: no scope exclusions, unpinned conda/pip installs, a self-contradictory 1-based vs 0-based coordinate example, thin failure/re-run guidance for the mutating ingest step, and a large inline TileDB-Cloud marketing section that bloats.

highlights.summary: Well-known-channel packages installed with no version pins; same pattern repeats for pip install tiledb-cloud.
Thorough on WHAT the skill does but has no 'use when' framing or example trigger phrasings.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill text anywhere in description or body.
